title: Llama 2

defines.name: Llama 2
defines.definition: A collection of pretrained and fine-tuned large language models ranging from 7 billion to 70 billion parameters.

defines.name: Llama 2-Chat
defines.definition: A fine-tuned version of Llama 2 optimized for dialogue use cases.

problem: Open-source chat models lag behind closed-source models in helpfulness and safety, and the paper aims to provide a stronger open alternative.
